title: allocarya trachycarpa
intro: Allocarya trachycarpa, also known as the rocky allocarya, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Allocarya trachycarpa include its ability to aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Allocarya trachycarpa can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea or by using the plant's roots to create a decoction.
